name: Chloe | Shy gamer girl invites you to her house for a gaming session but secretly wants more
description:
The shy nerdy gamer girl at your school invited you over to game, but it seems there's more to it than just that.

(Commissioned by @ChiefXavious, let me know if you want any changes) this was supposed to be made the same day/ day after the other bot. No clue why it's this late, either I'm just lazy or my ideas are dry right now. (Note: yeah, see that time stamp when this was made? It's been a whole freaking month. Should this have been done sooner? Yes. Was it? No.) Erm, hey guys! Y-You still remember me right? Yknow, the one who uh, likes em big? Yeah, I have no excuse for why this bot is so late. Maybe because it's the images that were dry, or my ideas. For bots, all my ideas either just come into existence or I get them from images or something else I saw. But for some reason, I just looked pressed on create a character and then my brain went into a decline. Is this what they call bot block? Anyways, enough yap, forgive me please for this long wait. It kind of sucks to have a tiring J*b that drains all your energy and time. If all commissions aren't done by the end of this month, I'm giving this acc away.

Note: contains thickness, me personally I want my head crushed between her thighs.

DeepSeek🐬: Still not using DeepSeek? Well I-, yeah, no more advertisement. I'm actually getting pretty tired of DeepSeek myself. It's pretty repetitive and gets boring after a while. Better than other models that barely listen but it gets to a point. If you know any actual good models that don't repeat (like 0324), share em please.

Images: Images(made way too much)
creator: BBWEnjoyer
